perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a yellow sundress stands outside a restaurant, waving excitedly at the camera with a video-call-style overlay showing another woman in a purple cap in the corner. (2) The scene cuts to the restaurant's exterior sign and tanks filled with live crabs and lobsters. (3) The woman in yellow is shown indoors, sitting at a wooden table and tasting a green seaweed dish with eggs. (4) The woman from the overlay (white T-shirt, purple cap) takes center stage, holding up a large cooked shrimp and then eating it with wasabi and soy sauce. (5) A series of close-ups show various dishes: steamed crabs, abalone on a bed of shredded cabbage, and a lobster salad decorated with orange slices. (6) The woman in the cap demonstrates how to properly peel and eat a crab leg. (7) The video concludes with both women and a third person giving multiple thumbs-up toward the camera over a table of empty plates.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music starts immediately and remains consistent throughout. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice introduces the location. (2) The sound of water splashing from the seafood tanks is briefly heard behind the narration. (3) The vocal track features two different female voices alternating; they use expressive, exaggerated tones to describe the food's texture and flavor. (4) Occasional 'ding' and sparkle sound effects (SFX) punctuate moments when food is revealed or a positive remark is made. (5) A male voice briefly chimes in from behind the camera to provide extra information about the seafood sourcing. (6) The audio ends with a collaborative shout of 'Great!' and the sound of hands hitting the table in a thumbs-up gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '老板帶我吃什麼??' (What did the boss take me to eat??) in a playful, bold font. (2) Functional text: Restaurant name '龜吼新小薇漁坊' with Google rating '4.8顆星' and address details. (3) Decorative caption: '全部都是活海鮮!!' (Everything is live seafood!!) with exclamation marks. (4) Food labels: '海菜炒蛋' (Seaweed fried with egg), '草蝦' (Grass shrimp), '萬里花蟹' (Wanli Flower Crab). (5) Tutorial text: '麻希的吃蟹小教室' (Mashi's Crab Eating Classroom) appearing as a header for the instructional segment. (6) Emotional hook: '蝦子在我嘴裡跳舞' (Shrimp dancing in my mouth) with dancing shrimp emojis. (7) Closing text: '肯定是大大拇指' (Definitely a big thumbs up) appearing as the hosts give their final verdict.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Restaurant Exterior & Live Seafood -> Multi-course Food Tasting -> Crab Eating Tutorial -> Final Verdict/Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators (yellow dress and white tee), 1 male boss/cameraman visible only by hands and heard off-screen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long brown hair and wears a yellow sundress; the second has shoulder-length hair, a purple baseball cap, and a white t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The exterior features a typical Taiwanese street with colorful restaurant signs; the interior is a standard seafood eatery with round wooden tables and floral wallpaper.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight outdoors and bright, warm fluorescent lighting indoors.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Intro -> Product Presentation -> Tutorial -> Review
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the '新小薇漁坊' seafood restaurant by highlighting the freshness of its ingredients, the specific seasonal offerings (crabs), and the high satisfaction of the diners. It serves as both a recommendation and a 'how-to' guide for eating seafood.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of restaurant name, location, and favorable comparison of food quality, combined with an invitation for viewers to visit.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Dual-host format with one appearing in a small circle overlay; heavy use of animated 'variety show' style captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows the 'Eat-With-Me' trend common in Taiwanese social media, focusing on local specialty seafood during the peak season.
